vllm.title: Fix Baichuan2-7B-Chat

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fix Baichuan2-7B-Chat model, use "ROPE" instead of "ALIBI" when load Baichuan2-7B-Chat model
relate issue: #1561 #1092 #1085
before fix:
curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/completions \
